entries.section: Leveling Tips for Assassination Rogue DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Be sure to level First Aid. This will provide excellent healing for yourself. Since Rogues rely on energy and not mana, having low health is the only thing that would slow them down and prevent Rogues from engaging their next target.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Assassination Rogue DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Be sure to use your defensive cooldowns like Evasion when fighting multiple enemies. If you think you still won't make it, Vanish ! Avoiding death is very important while leveling as dying costs time returning to your corpse.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Assassination Rogue DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: As you level up, you will gain access to stronger gear and stronger quest rewards. Don't stick around running a low-level dungeon hunting for a specific drop; just move on with the leveling process, and you are likely to find something else along the way.

entries.section: Leveling Tips for Assassination Rogue DPS in TBC Classic
entries.text: Using Deadly Poison on both of your weapons is recommended, so you can reliably have a poison debuff on your target to get the damage bonus on Mutilate , instead of waiting around hoping to trigger a single Deadly Poison.

sections.heading: Leveling Tips for Assassination Rogue DPS in TBC Classic
